text:
Created attachment 189592
deskutils/spice-gtk: update to 0.34

+ remove SPICE_SLAVE define and gtk20 dependencies due to the support for the py extension was dropped by upstream:

https://github.com/SPICE/spice-gtk/commit/0917002c48a0a5deb615d120a0e5997eefc89fd4
